name: io.github.ravixalgorithm/onto
title: Onto
description: Clean Markdown and AI-readability scoring for any URL. Built for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: ONTO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Onto API key (get one at https://app.buildonto.dev/read/keys — free tier includes 1,000 requests/month).

environmentVariables.name: ONTO_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the Onto API base URL. Defaults to https://api.buildonto.dev.
